title: Users cannot access Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat
impact: Users cannot access Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat.

updates.content:
Title: We're looking into a potential problem impacting Microsoft 365 Copilot chat

User impact: We're checking for potential impact to your users.

Current status: We're investigating a potential issue impacting Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat and checking for impact to your organization. We'll provide an update within 60 minutes.

Title: Users cannot access Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat

User impact: Users cannot access Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat.

Current status: We’ve identified an issue with a recent deployment for Microsoft Copilot. We’re reverting to a previous build to remediate impact as soon as possible. We expect this to be completed in the next 30 minutes.

Scope of impact: All Microsoft 365 Copilot users are not able to access Copilot. This section may be updated as our investigation progresses.

Start time: Thursday, June 11, 2026, at 8:00 PM UTC

Next update by: Thursday, June 11, 2026, at 10:30 PM UTC

Title: Users cannot access Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat

User impact: Users cannot access Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat.

Final status: We've determined that this issue is a duplicate of another event. Please look for further updates in MO1387691. This communication will expire in 24 hours. 

This is the final update for the event.
